---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve CertiVault
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Is Your Feature Related to a Problem?
Describe the problem you're trying to solve.

## Proposed Solution
How would you solve this? What should the feature do?

## Why Is This Important?
Why should this be added? Who does it benefit?

## Alternatives Considered
Any other ways to achieve this?

## Additional Context
Any other information, sketches, or examples?
